accounts.name: quote_mint
docs: Quote mint for claim

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays rent when [`temp_wsol_token_account`] is created (`init_if_needed`); receives rent when it is closed after the relay CPI.

accounts.name: quote_mint
docs: Quote mint from donation fee pda.

accounts.name: donation_fee_pda_ata
docs: WSOL ATA owned by `donation_fee_pda`.

accounts.name: config_id
docs: stored on the PDA, so distinct `config_id`s for the same `base_mint` derive distinct addresses.

accounts.name: sharing_config
docs: (derived from `[SHARING_CONFIG_SEED, base_mint]`)

instructions.name: create_fee_sharing_config
docs: Create Fee Sharing Config

instructions.name: extend_fee_config
docs: Realloc the fee_config PDA to [`FeeConfig::CURRENT_SIZE`] (signer pays rent delta).

instructions.name: get_fees
docs: Get Fees

instructions.name: initialize_fee_config
docs: Initialize FeeConfig admin

instructions.name: reset_fee_sharing_config
docs: Reset Fee Sharing Config and distribute pending fees first

instructions.name: reset_fee_sharing_config_v2
docs: Reset Fee Sharing Config and distribute pending fees first

instructions.name: revoke_fee_sharing_authority
docs: Revoke Fee Sharing Authority

instructions.name: transfer_fee_sharing_authority
docs: Transfer Fee Sharing Authority

instructions.name: update_admin
docs: Update admin (only callable by admin)

instructions.name: update_fee_config
docs: Set/Replace fee parameters entirely (only callable by admin)

instructions.name: update_fee_shares
docs: Update Fee Shares, make sure to distribute all the fees before calling this

instructions.name: update_fee_shares_v2
docs: Update Fee Shares, make sure to distribute all the fees before calling this

instructions.name: update_stable_fee_config
docs: Set/Replace fee parameters entirely (only callable by admin)

instructions.name: upsert_fee_tiers
docs: Update or expand fee tiers (only callable by admin)

instructions.name: upsert_stable_fee_tiers
docs: Update or expand fee tiers (only callable by admin)

errors.name: UnauthorizedProgram
errors.msg: Only Pump and PumpSwap programs can call this instruction

errors.name: FeeTiersNotSorted
errors.msg: Fee tiers must be sorted by market cap threshold (ascending)

errors.name: SharingConfigAdminRevoked
errors.msg: Sharing config authority has been revoked - sharing config can only be updated once

errors.name: InvalidShareTotal
errors.msg: Invalid share total - must equal 10_000 basis points

errors.name: NotAuthorized
errors.msg: The given account is not authorized to execute this instruction.

errors.name: SharingConfigNotActive
errors.msg: Fee sharing config is not active

errors.name: AmmAccountsRequiredForGraduatedCoin
errors.msg: AMM accounts are required for graduated coins

errors.name: ShareholderAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Remaining account key doesn't match shareholder address

errors.name: FeeSharesAlreadyUpdated
errors.msg: Reward split can only be updated once

errors.name: InvalidFeeConfigAccount
errors.msg: Account is not a valid FeeConfig for this instruction

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Mint does not match quote mint

types.name: DonationFeePda
docs: Escrow PDA for donation relay: one per (mint, donation campaign `config_id`).

fields.name: bump
docs: The bump for the PDA

fields.name: admin
docs: The admin account that can update the fee config

fields.name: flat_fees
docs: The flat fees for non-pump pools

fields.name: fee_tiers
docs: The fee tiers

fields.name: stable_fee_tiers
docs: The fee tiers

types.name: SocialFeePda
docs: Platform identifier: 0=pump, 1=twitter, etc.

fields.name: user_id
docs: Max 20 characters to fit u64::MAX (18,446,744,073,709,551,615) as a string.
Actual storage: 4 bytes (length prefix) + 20 bytes (content) = 24 bytes.

constants.name: PUMP_GLOBAL_SEED
docs: Bonding Curve Program Global Seed
